name: Rangrim Loderr

sheet.name: Rangrim Loderr
sheet.background_story: A miner by trade, Rangrim worked pulling precious minerals from the ground so long that his skin turned a peculiar shade. When the magistrate that operated his mine began laying off his coworkers, Rangrim led a riot to seize power of the mine for the people. After the bloodshed had ceased, they were in control of the mine and he was crowned their new leader.

description: A miner by trade, Rangrim worked pulling precious minerals from the ground so long that his skin turned a peculiar shade.
